entry.title: Beacon Hills, a Beacon for Bullshit
entry.summary:
Author: Thymos_2000

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,207Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Instead of moving to Linora, the Byers and Eleven move to beacon hills. Meanwhile the pack has to deal with split bonds, a new weird family, secrets between each other, trauma, and the two hunters pretending to be cops and their weird friend.

entry.title: does it count as a midnight tryst if it’s only nine thirty?
entry.summary:
Author: thePurebloodPrat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,469Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: "The pack meeting itself is pretty lackluster. Mostly, everyone is reconnecting, sharing some anecdotes about their time at school or what they’ve been doing at work. Even Derek manages to socialize a little. Stiles can’t help but notice how much more settled he looks. Gone are the skittish, wary glances and deep frown, forced nonchalance.Now he snarks with the best of them.Stiles almost feels bad reaching into his pocket to check his notifications."-----Fellas is it gay to clock your sort of friend, sort of acquaintance, sort of homoerotic saving-each-other's-lives-but-never-really-talking-about-it situationship as being horny on grindr?......Can it be?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Inchoate
entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,639Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: “The first shape is the truest shape.” Derek has spent several years building a life with Stiles in Monterey where he runs a small psychotherapy practice. After a mysterious patient leaves Derek cursed, the most vulnerable version of him emerges during a late-night grocery run. In the fluorescent quiet of a nearly empty supermarket, Stiles must convince the boy beneath the man that he is finally safe.

entry.title: 'Til the landslide brought me down
entry.summary:
Author: Renmackree

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,900Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 1

Summary: The Argents had decided to leave Beacon Hills after Gerard's death, which meant there was room for Derek to breathe for just a second and recover with his whole but still fractured Pack. They were one bad day from breaking again so Derek did the only thing he could think of to try and keep them together. He took them to the cabin.--Or Derek and Stiles connect over the summer while Derek builds a Pack.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,320Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 304

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,303Chapters: 8/40Kudos: 24

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: One Day Honey, One Day Onions
entry.summary:
Author: iamnooneshero

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,122Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: After Laura’s murder, Derek has only one thing on his mind: revenge. He travels tirelessly across the land in search of her killers: the Argent royal family in Frankonia. After three years of campaigns and battles, he is closer to his goal than ever before. What still stands between them? The small country of Pechtar. But they surrender without a fight and even throw him a banquet. Why not take advantage of the break and let the beautiful belly dancer warm his bed? Honey-brown eyes and alabaster skin literally cast a spell over him.

entry.title: soulmate au, 10k
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,515Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 54

Summary: Stiles is pretty sure that soulmates aren't a real thing. Sue him, he's a romantic. Which means that he doesn't believe that love is predetermined by the stars, or the fates, or any bullshit like that. There's no way a magic spell exists that can order up love like it's a large pepperoni with extra mushrooms. Stiles thinks - no, he knows - that love is decision you make. One that you keep making, every day. And even if soulmates were a real thing, he definitely wouldn't be Derek Hale's. But on the off chance Derek does have a soulmate - someone out there who could finally make him happy in the way he deserves to be happy - Stiles might as well try the stupid spell. He's going to find whoever that is if it kills him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: For the ones I love, I will sacrifice
entry.summary:
Author: interested

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 130,478Chapters: 37/38Kudos: 2,004

Summary: Stiles is doing the best he can. His best friend, a certain Scott McCall, is furiously in love with Allison Argent, resulting in a less than ideal best friend situation. Werewolves are still a huge (inconvenient yet strangely now normal) part of his life. But to add the metaphorical cherry to his metaphorical sundae, Derek Hale (Mr.Tall-Dark-And-Broody himself) is starting to pick up on a secret Stiles has been hiding since the time of his mother's death. A secret he has kept from the pack, his father, and even Scott. And though Derek makes him want to open his mouth and spill all there is to spill, Stiles can't bring himself to open up to the man. He can't.....can he? OR Stiles has been abused by a family member ever since his mother's death, and Derek finds out just as the beatings become the worst they have ever been. Shit hits the fan.

entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,191Chapters: 2/39Kudos: 13

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,669Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: with defenses down
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,548Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 17

Summary: So he gently moves his hand across Derek’s toned stomach, and Derek genuinely seems to melt into the couch, and back against Stiles. He keeps his fingers looped gently over Stiles’ wrist, keeping him close, leaning his head against his outstretched arm. Stiles peeks over his shoulder to see Derek’s eyes closed, looking at peace, and sudden tears spring into Stiles’ eyes again at the unexpected sight. The fact that he can give this to his boyfriend, can make him feel safe and relaxed and cared for, is more than he could hope for, is everything he’s wanted, and he kind of wants to thank Derek but can’t bear to make things weird right when they’re unlocking a new level in their relationship. So sue Stiles, he plays too many video games. New achievement unlocked! +100 points for Making Boyfriend Feel Safe.-Or, Stiles gives Derek bellyrubs and experiences a lot of emotions about it. Optional chapter two including light smut, but can be read without.

entry.title: Margaritki
entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,588Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: After their first night together, Derek and Stiles spend a rain-washed April day in Monterey. By moonrise, Derek shares the most private part of himself: the freedom of running as a wolf beneath the full moon. In a field of flowers, wonder becomes certainty. The universe responds. Or: a little story about first love, belonging, and one revolution of the Earth.
